message:
refactor: code cleanup and extension shutdown improvements

Extension Manager (src/extensions.rs):
- Add clear_ui_sender() method for graceful shutdown cleanup

Interactive Mode (src/interactive.rs):
- Move session message loading from PiApp::new() to run_interactive()
- Pass pre-loaded messages and usage to PiApp::new() as parameters
- Call clear_ui_sender() in quit_cmd() to prevent lingering receivers

RPC Handler (src/rpc.rs):
- Formatting cleanup: standardize map_err closure formatting
- No functional changes, just rustfmt-compliant line breaks

Tests:
- Minor VCR test adjustments
- E2E test improvements

The extension cleanup ensures the bubbletea external forwarder thread
can exit cleanly without blocking on a disconnected receiver.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
